_doc: Per-preset diffRatio ceilings for the MapLibre parity gate. The spec asserts measured diffRatio ≤ baseline × HEADROOM. Values captured 2026-05-13 after (a) translucent composite premultiply fix (c.rgb * c.a * opacity instead of c.rgb * opacity, so AA edge pixels no longer doubled in brightness vs MapLibre below the opacity=1.0 threshold) and (b) polygon-hole preservation through clip+repair. The earlier line-AA spec-alignment attempt was reverted because the geometry/shader formulas matched MapLibre's spec but the resulting visible line shifted by ~1 device px versus MapLibre's actual rendering, which raised Tokyo parity even though the math was correct. Rebake on every PR that explicitly notes a regression or improvement; do not silently relax.
